mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO im_offline_message_delivery ( id, message_id, message_type, user_id, device_id, delivery_status, delivery_count, last_delivery_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.messageId}, #{item.messageType}, #{item.userId}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.deliveryStatus}, #{item.deliveryCount}, #{item.lastDeliveryTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE delivery_status = VALUES(delivery_status), delivery_count = VALUES(delivery_count), last_delivery_time = VALUES(last_delivery_time), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM im_offline_message_delivery WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delivery_status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE im_offline_message_delivery SET delivery_count = #{deliveryCount}, last_delivery_time = #{lastDeliveryTime}, update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE im_offline_message_delivery SET delivery_status = #{status},
remark = #{errorReason},
delivery_count = delivery_count + 1, last_delivery_time = #{updateTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id IN
#{id}
